REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT EDMUND CHUTE'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AS TO THE FIRST, THIRD, AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION IS DENIED. NO DETERMINATION CAN BE MADE BASED ON THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT AND JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENTS TO ESTABLISH THE FIRST ELEMENT OF JUDICIAL ESTOPPEL, I.E. THAT THE SAME PARTY HAS TAKEN TWO POSITIONS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Continued To Feb-15-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Edmund Chute For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The First, Third, And Fourth Causes Of Action
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Daniel P. McLoughlin; Law Offices of Daniel P. McLoughlin; 510-845-1816; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant Edmund Chute.
Joseph M. Breall; Breall & Breall, LLP; 415-345-0545; appearing in person on behalf of plaintiff Kevin Dorgan Electrical Inc.

Counsel for defendant Edmund Chute contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDMUND CHUTE'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AS TO THE FIRST, THIRD, AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION is DENIED. No determination can be made based on the allegations in the complaint and judicially noticeable documents to establish the first element of judicial estoppel, i.e. that the same party has taken two positions.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel McLoughlin, 510.845.1516 of Law Offices of Daniel McLoughlin for Defendant Edmund Chute. (Court call)
Henry Wykowski, 415.788.4545 of Wykowski Law for Plaintiff Kevin Dorgan. (Zooom)
Andrew Scher, 415.788.4545 of Wykowski Law for Appellent Ansrew Scher. (Zoom)
Kevin Dorgan, 415.312.5051 Plaintiff. (Zoom)

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF KEVIN DORGAN ELECTRICAL, INC., A CORPORATION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is Granted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
